# Test Fixtures

This directory contains test fixtures for pdf2txt.

## PDF Files

Add sample PDF files here for integration testing. Recommended files:
- Simple single-page PDF (for basic extraction tests)
- Multi-page financial report (for realistic testing)
- PDF with tables (for layout testing)

## Note

Due to file size constraints, actual PDF files should be added locally and not committed to version control. Add `.pdf` to `.gitignore` in this directory.
